# Kyokara

> Kyokara is an AI-first programming language and runtime. It is designed for machine generation, machine verification, and machine refactoring â€” with humans as reviewers and operators. The compiler is an API that emits structured JSON (diagnostics, typed ASTs, symbol graphs, hole specs, fix patches). The runtime enforces capability-based sandboxing and deterministic replay. Written in Rust.

## Core Concepts

- [Design Specification](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/blob/main/docs/design-v0.md): Full language and runtime design document covering syntax, type system, effects, contracts, IR, toolchain, and runtime.
- [README](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/blob/main/README.md): Project overview, motivation, language examples, architecture, and roadmap.

## Language Features

- Convention-based modules: file path = module path (`math.ky` â†’ module `math`), `import math` brings pub names into scope
- Private by default: use `pub` keyword to export functions, types, and capabilities across modules
- Pure by default: functions without `with` clauses cannot perform side effects
- Explicit capabilities: `with Net`, `with Db`, `with Clock`, `with Secrets` â€” deny-by-default, manifest-enforced
- ADTs and exhaustive pattern matching: `type Result[T, E] = | Ok(value: T) | Err(error: E)`
- Contracts: `requires`, `ensures`, `old()` â€” checked at runtime, optionally verified by SMT (restricted fragment, best-effort)
- Property-based tests: `property name(x: T) { expr }` as first-class syntax, bodies type-checked (must return Bool)
- Typed holes: `?name(args)` compiles to structured hole specs with expected type, effects, and constraints
- Pipeline operator: `x |> f(a=1)` desugars to `f(x, a=1)`
- Error propagation: `expr?` desugars to early-return match on `Result`
- No null, no exceptions: `Option[T]` and `Result[T, E]` only (builtin types, available without imports)

## Compiler Architecture

- [stdx](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/tree/main/crates/stdx): Shared utilities (leaf crate, no kyokara deps)
- [span](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/tree/main/crates/span): FileId, Span, TextRange â€” source locations
- [intern](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/tree/main/crates/intern): String interning via lasso
- [diagnostics](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/tree/main/crates/diagnostics): Diagnostic, Severity, Fix types
- [parser](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/tree/main/crates/parser): Tree-agnostic recursive-descent parser emitting SyntaxKind + Event stream
- [syntax](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/tree/main/crates/syntax): Lossless CST via rowan + logos lexer + typed AST wrappers
- [hir-def](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/tree/main/crates/hir-def): HIR data types (items, bodies, exprs, patterns, types, effects, holes) + CST-to-HIR lowering
- [hir-ty](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/tree/main/crates/hir-ty): Type inference, unification, exhaustiveness checking, effect checking
- [hir](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/tree/main/crates/hir): High-level facade for semantic queries
- [kir](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/tree/main/crates/kir): SSA-based intermediate representation â€” block parameters (not phi nodes), reuses hir-ty::Ty, arena-based values/blocks/functions. Inst enum includes Const, Binary, Unary, RecordCreate, FieldGet, RecordUpdate, AdtConstruct, Call, Assert, Hole, BlockParam, FnParam, AdtFieldGet, FnRef. Text format printer, builder API. Well-formedness validator enforces Bool conditions, Fn call targets, Record/Adt field bases, predecessor edges, duplicate cases. HIRâ†’KIR lowering pass with ADT switch dedup/catch-all/nested-literal checks, sequential match early termination, contract old() pre-state, function references
- [codegen](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/tree/main/crates/codegen): WASM code generation from KIR. Compiles KIR modules to WASM binary via wasm-encoder. Value representation: Intâ†’i64, Floatâ†’f64, Bool/Unitâ†’i32, ADT/Recordâ†’i32 (linear memory pointers). Bump allocator, ADT tag+fields layout, record sorted-by-name fields. Structured control flow: if/else for branches, block/br_table for switch. Supports scalar arithmetic, comparisons, let bindings, function calls, ADT construction/matching, record creation/field access, contract assertions. Deferred: closures, strings, lists, maps, intrinsics, capabilities
- [eval](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/tree/main/crates/eval): Tree-walking interpreter with scoped environments, core stdlib (List, Map, String, Int/Float intrinsics + print/println/int_to_string/string_concat), builtin Option/Result types, runtime contract enforcement (requires/ensures/old), and capability manifest enforcement (`--caps` flag, deny-by-default when manifest present)
- [fmt](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/tree/main/crates/fmt): Canonical code formatter â€” Wadler-Lindig Doc IR, 2-space indent, 100-col width, import sorting, comment preservation, verbatim error fallback
- [refactor](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/tree/main/crates/refactor): Semantic refactor engine â€” CST-based rename (function, type, capability, variant), add missing match cases, add missing capability annotation, transactional verification (apply edits in-memory, re-check, return Verified/Failed/Skipped status)
- [lsp](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/tree/main/crates/lsp): LSP server with salsa incrementality â€” diagnostics, hover, go-to-definition, find references, completion, code actions (quickfixes), formatting
- [pbt](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/tree/main/crates/pbt): Property-based testing â€” choice-sequence engine (SplitMix64 RNG, record/replay), type-driven generators (scalars, ADTs, records, Option, Result, List, Map), 4-pass shrinker (zero-suffix, block deletion, binary-search minimize, pair swap), corpus persistence, contract-for-free testing of `requires`/`ensures`/`invariant` functions, explicit `property` declarations (bodies type-checked, must return Bool)
- [api](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/tree/main/crates/api): JSON serialization of all compiler outputs (diagnostics, typed AST, symbol graph with stable namespaced IDs, patches, refactor results)
- [cli](https://github.com/kyokaralang/kyokara/tree/main/crates/cli): `kyokara check`, `kyokara run`, `kyokara fmt`, `kyokara refactor`, `kyokara test`, `kyokara lsp`

## Optional
